רוב האנשים מסתכלים רק על השורה התחתונה —: Most people only look at the bottom line — the amount to pay — and move on. But this amount is made up of many small items, each an opportunity for an irrelevant charge. An addition of ₪9 or ₪19 a month seems negligible, but it's ₪108–₪228 a year — and when several add up, it's real savings waiting to be noticed.
רוב האנשים נשארים אצל אותו ספק שנים, בזמ: Most people stay with the same provider for years, while market prices are dropping. A plan that used to cost ₪150 three years ago is now sold for ₪29–₪49 with more data. A monthly gap of ₪100 is ₪1,200 a year — without you doing anything but staying.
רוב הממירים מגיעים עם PIN ברירת מחדל ידו: Most converters come with a known default PIN (0000 / 1234). The first thing to do is to replace it with a personal code — otherwise, all content protection and purchases are worthless.
